items.situation: dormitory quiet hours reminder
items.announcement: Hello everyone, this is your RA. A quick reminder that quiet hours in all campus dormitories are from 10 PM to 8 AM, Sunday through Thursday. During these hours, please keep noise to a minimum in hallways and common areas. This policy is especially important with midterm exams starting next week. If you need to study in a group, please use the 24-hour study lounge in the student union. Repeated violations may result in a meeting with housing staff. Thank you for your cooperation.

questions.question: When do quiet hours begin on weeknights?

options.A: At 8 PM
options.B: At 9 PM
options.C: At 10 PM
options.D: At 11 PM

questions.explanation: 公告明确指出，安静时段为晚上10点至次日上午8点。

questions.question: What can be inferred about the reason for this reminder?

options.A: There have been many recent noise complaints.
options.B: Students are preparing for upcoming exams.
options.C: New residents are moving into the dormitory.
options.D: The quiet hours policy has just been changed.

questions.explanation: 公告提到，鉴于下周中期考试即将开始，此项提醒尤为重要，暗示学生需要安静环境备考。

items.situation: reading assignment for next week
items.announcement: Before our next lecture, please read chapters four and five in your biology textbook. Focus on the sections about cellular respiration. We will begin class with a short quiz on this material. Also, the article I mentioned on mitochondrial DNA is now available as a PDF on the course website under 'Resources.' I recommend you read it as well, as it provides useful context for our lab on Wednesday. Bring your questions to class.

questions.question: What are the students required to read before the next class?

options.A: Chapters three and four
options.B: A single article on the course website
options.C: Chapters four and five
options.D: Only the sections on mitochondrial DNA

questions.explanation: 教授明确指示：'请阅读生物教科书第四章和第五章。'

questions.question: What will most likely happen at the start of the next class?

options.A: The professor will return previous exams.
options.B: Students will begin a new lab experiment.
options.C: There will be a quiz on the reading.
options.D: The class will discuss the PDF article.

questions.explanation: 教授表示：'我们将以本部分内容的简短测验开始课程'，暗示这是第一项课堂活动。

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To cancel an upcoming lab session
options.B: To outline preparation for the next class
options.C: To change the required textbook for the course
options.D: To remind students about office hours

questions.explanation: 总体信息是告知学生阅读任务、测验以及为下节课和实验准备的补充文章。

items.situation: building closure for maintenance
items.announcement: Attention. The Science Hall will be closed all day this coming Saturday, November 12th, for mandatory fire alarm system testing and maintenance. No one will be permitted to enter. This includes all labs, classrooms, and faculty offices. If you have lab work scheduled, please consult your professor for an alternative arrangement. The building will reopen Sunday morning at its usual time. We appreciate your understanding as we ensure campus safety.

questions.question: Why is the Science Hall being closed?

options.A: For a deep cleaning of all laboratories
options.B: For fire alarm system testing
options.C: Because of a scheduled power outage
options.D: To host a private campus event

questions.explanation: 公告明确说明关闭原因是'进行强制性的火灾报警系统测试和维护'。

questions.question: What should a student with a Saturday lab session do?

options.A: Come to the building on Sunday instead.
options.B: Contact their professor for instructions.
options.C: Wait in the hallway until testing is complete.
options.D: Use a lab in a different building without asking.

questions.explanation: 公告要求'咨询教授以获取替代安排'，暗示学生应主动寻求指导。

items.situation: textbook edition update
items.announcement: A quick note about the textbook. I've been informed that the new, fifth edition of 'Introduction to Sociology' has been released. For this course, you may use either the fourth or the fifth edition. The chapter topics are the same, though some examples are updated. However, please note that the page numbers and some minor section headings differ. I will always refer to chapter numbers in my lectures. If you are buying the book new, I suggest getting the fifth edition, but don't feel you need to replace an older copy.

questions.question: Which editions of the textbook are acceptable for the course?

options.A: Only the new fifth edition
options.B: The third or the fourth edition
options.C: Either the fourth or the fifth edition
options.D: Any edition from the past five years

questions.explanation: 教授明确说明：'第四版或第五版教材均可使用。'

questions.question: What is a potential problem if a student uses the older edition?

options.A: The core theories will be completely different.
options.B: The page numbers may not match the professor's references.
options.C: The older edition will be missing several key chapters.
options.D: The professor will not allow it in the classroom.

questions.explanation: 教授提到不同版本页码存在差异，暗示若按页码布置阅读，使用旧版教材的学生可能难以定位。

questions.question: What is the professor's primary message?

options.A: Announcing a change to the required textbook.
options.B: Providing flexibility regarding the textbook edition.
options.C: Warning students about incorrect information in the old book.
options.D: Informing students that the textbook is optional.

questions.explanation: 核心信息是告知学生两个版本皆可接受并提供指导，强调灵活性。

items.situation: campus bookstore sale announcement
items.announcement: The campus bookstore's end-of-semester sale starts this Monday. All general merchandise, like clothing, gifts, and supplies, will be 30% off. This discount does not apply to textbooks, course packets, or technology items. The sale runs from Monday through Friday during regular store hours. It's a great chance to stock up on university spirit wear before the holidays. Remember, you can use your student ID for an additional 5% off sale items. We hope to see you there!

questions.question: What is the discount on general merchandise during the sale?

options.A: 5% off
options.B: 20% off
options.C: 30% off
options.D: 50% off

questions.explanation: 公告清楚写明：'所有普通商品...将享受七折优惠。'

questions.question: What would be the best reason for a student to visit the bookstore during the sale?

options.A: To buy a required textbook at a lower price.
options.B: To purchase a new laptop for next semester.
options.C: To get a discount on a university sweatshirt.
options.D: To sell back their old course packets.

questions.explanation: 促销适用于服装（校园文化衫）等普通商品，不包含教材或电子产品。购买卫衣符合该类别。

items.situation: reading assignment for next week
items.announcement: For Wednesday, I want you to read the first three short stories in our anthology, 'Modern American Voices.' Pay particular attention to the use of symbolism in the story 'Clay.' We'll be comparing the authors' narrative techniques. Also, please note that your first short analysis paper will now be due next Friday, not this Friday as originally scheduled. The paper should focus on one of the stories we discuss this week. Any questions, see me after class.

questions.question: What specific element should students focus on in the story 'Clay'?

options.A: The historical context
options.B: The author's biography
options.C: The use of symbolism
options.D: The comparative narrative techniques

questions.explanation: 教授直接要求学生：'请特别关注《黏土》这篇故事中象征手法的运用。'

questions.question: What does the change in the due date imply about the assignment?

options.A: It has been canceled entirely.
options.B: Students will have more time to write it.
options.C: It must now be about a different topic.
options.D: It will be completed during class time.

questions.explanation: 截止日期从本周五推迟至下周五，意味着学生多出一周时间。

questions.question: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To introduce a new textbook for the course
options.B: To assign reading and clarify an assignment deadline
options.C: To cancel the upcoming Wednesday class session
options.D: To discuss the grades for the previous paper

questions.explanation: 教授布置了具体阅读任务，并宣布首篇论文截止日期变更。

items.situation: parking notice about lot closure
items.announcement: This is a parking notice. Lot B, behind the gymnasium, will be closed for repaving from 6 AM Monday until 6 PM next Wednesday. All vehicles must be removed by Sunday night. Alternative parking is available in Lot D near the library, but spaces there fill quickly. We strongly encourage using the campus shuttle from the remote Lot F during this period. Parking permits will be temporarily valid in Lot D. Tow trucks will be on site Monday morning. Thank you.

questions.question: How long will Lot B be closed?

options.A: From Monday morning to Wednesday evening
options.B: For the entire weekend
options.C: From Sunday night to Friday morning
options.D: For one full week

questions.explanation: 公告说明关闭时间为'周一早6点至下周三晚6点'。

questions.question: What is the implied best option for a commuter student during the closure?

options.A: Park in Lot D very early in the morning.
options.B: Park in Lot B after Monday morning.
options.C: Use the shuttle from the remote Lot F.
options.D: Request a special permit for faculty lots.

questions.explanation: 公告'强烈建议使用从偏远F停车场出发的校园接驳车'，暗示这是最可靠的替代方案，因为D停车场很快会停满。

items.situation: project group assignments posted
items.announcement: Good morning. Your group assignments for the final research project are now posted on the course website. I've formed the groups based on your topic preferences from the survey. Each group has four or five students. Your first task is to find your group members and schedule a meeting outside of class this week to choose a specific research question. I've also reserved conference rooms in the library for group work; you can book them online. The project proposal is due in two weeks.

questions.question: Where can students find their group assignments?

options.A: On a paper list outside the classroom
options.B: By asking the professor after class
options.C: On the course website
options.D: In an email sent to each student

questions.explanation: 教授明确说明作业'现已发布在课程网站上'。

questions.question: How did the professor most likely decide the group compositions?

options.A: By random selection of student names
options.B: Based on students' grades on the midterm
options.C: According to students' topic preferences
options.D: By allowing students to choose their own groups

questions.explanation: 教授表示分组是'根据你们在问卷调查中的选题意向'确定的。

questions.question: What is the professor primarily doing in this announcement?

options.A: Explaining the grading criteria for the final exam
options.B: Initiating the first steps of the group project
options.C: Canceling the previously assigned individual project
options.D: Returning graded assignments from last week

questions.explanation: 公告通知学生分组已公布，并说明首项任务要求，标志着项目正式启动。

items.situation: schedule change for shuttle bus
items.announcement: Attention shuttle riders. Due to construction on University Avenue, the Blue Line shuttle route will be altered starting tomorrow. The shuttle will not stop at the Science Hall or the Student Union. Instead, temporary stops are set up at the north entrance of the Library and behind the Dining Hall. The new route map is available on our website. We expect this detour to last for approximately three weeks. Regular service will resume once the construction is complete. Thank you for your patience.

questions.question: What is the reason for the shuttle route change?

options.A: A special campus event
options.B: Construction on University Avenue
options.C: A shortage of shuttle bus drivers
options.D: Regular seasonal schedule adjustment

questions.explanation: 通知开头写道：'由于大学大道施工，蓝线班车路线将进行调整。'

questions.question: Where should a student who needs to go to the Science Hall get off the shuttle?

options.A: At the regular Science Hall stop.
options.B: At the temporary stop behind the Dining Hall.
options.C: At the Student Union stop as usual.
options.D: The shuttle no longer serves that area directly.

questions.explanation: 通知说明班车'将不在科学馆停靠'，这意味着学生需要在临时站点下车步行。

items.situation: exam format change from essay to multiple choice
items.announcement: I have an update about the final exam. After reviewing the syllabus, I've decided to change the format. Instead of one long essay, the exam will now consist of fifty multiple-choice questions covering all the major concepts from the lectures and the textbook. This will allow me to test a broader range of material. The exam date and time remain the same. I will post a study guide on the course portal by Friday. This change is final, so please prepare accordingly.

questions.question: What is the new format for the final exam?

options.A: Two short essay questions
options.B: An oral presentation
options.C: Fifty multiple-choice questions
options.D: A combination of essays and short answers

questions.explanation: 教授明确表示：'考试将改为五十道选择题。'

questions.question: Why did the professor most likely make this change?

options.A: To reduce the amount of grading required.
options.B: To test a wider variety of course content.
options.C: Because students requested an easier format.
options.D: To align with the format of the midterm exam.

questions.explanation: 教授说新形式'能让我测试更广泛的内容'，这意味着涵盖的知识范围更广。

questions.question: What is the main point of the professor's announcement?

options.A: To postpone the final exam to a later date
options.B: To announce a significant change in exam structure
options.C: To remind students about the required textbook
options.D: To cancel the final exam entirely

questions.explanation: 核心信息是告知学生考试形式从论述题改为选择题。

items.situation: senior capstone presentation schedule
items.announcement: Attention all senior psychology majors. The schedule for your mandatory capstone presentations has been finalized and posted. Presentations will take place next Monday and Tuesday, April 14th and 15th, in the Behavioral Sciences Building, Room 205. Each student is required to present for exactly fifteen minutes, followed by a five-minute faculty question period. Please note that attendance for the entire two-day session is compulsory for all majors, as it is a core program requirement. We strongly advise you to review the posted schedule carefully to confirm your assigned time slot.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To inform seniors of the finalized capstone presentation schedule and requirements.
options.B: To describe the grading criteria for the capstone project.
options.C: To recruit faculty volunteers to judge the presentations.
options.D: To encourage students from other majors to attend the presentations.

questions.explanation: A正确，因为它抓住了通知的核心目的：宣布活动的时间、地点和强制性。B是错误目的；未提及评分。C是相关但未说明的行动，通知中未要求。D是反向意图；通知说明出勤对主修生是强制的，并非公开邀请他人。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the capstone presentations?

options.A: They are optional but recommended for psychology majors.
options.B: Students will be graded solely on their presentation slides.
options.C: The event is considered a significant part of the psychology program.
options.D: The schedule is subject to frequent last-minute changes.

questions.explanation: C是有效推断，得到通知中'强制性'、'核心课程要求'和'全程参加'的支持。A是反向意图，与'强制性'和'必须参加'直接矛盾。B是过度推断；未提供评分细节。D是不相关推断；通知说明时间表'已确定'，暗示稳定性，而非频繁变动。

items.situation: computer lab relocating to a different floor
items.announcement: Good afternoon. This is an announcement from Information Technology Services. The main computer lab in Dunham Library is relocating from the basement to the third floor, starting this Friday. The new lab will open next Monday morning at eight a.m. Please be aware that the basement lab will be closed all day Friday for equipment moving and setup. All printing stations and specialized software will be available in the new location. We apologize for any temporary inconvenience and appreciate your patience during this upgrade.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: New hours for the Dunham Library.
options.B: A relocation of the main computer lab.
options.C: A temporary closure of the entire library.
options.D: An increase in printing fees for students.

questions.explanation: B正确；核心消息是实验室从地下室搬到三楼。A是错误细节；未讨论开放时间，只提到新实验室的开放时间。C是过度推断；只有实验室周五关闭，不是整个图书馆。D是相关但未提及的话题，通知中未涉及。

questions.stem: What are students advised about the basement computer lab this Friday?

options.A: It will have reduced hours.
options.B: It will offer limited software access.
options.C: It will be open for emergency use only.
options.D: It will be closed all day.

questions.explanation: D正确，如直接说明：'地下室实验室周五全天关闭。'A是错误细节；是关闭，不仅仅是缩短时间。B是错误归属细节；有限访问可能合理，但通知说明是关闭。C是相关但未提及的可能性。

items.situation: career fair preparation workshop with resume review
items.announcement: Attention students. The Career Development Center is hosting a preparation workshop for next month's university-wide career fair. The session will be held this Wednesday at 4 p.m. in the Student Union, Conference Room B. We will cover strategies for engaging with recruiters and conducting effective follow-up. Most importantly, we are offering a personalized resume review for all attendees. Please bring a printed copy of your current resume. Space is limited, so we encourage you to register on our website by Tuesday evening to secure your spot.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To announce the dates for the university career fair.
options.B: To describe the companies attending the career fair.
options.C: To promote a workshop that prepares students for the career fair.
options.D: To remind students to update their online career profiles.

questions.explanation: C正确；通知的核心是推广预备研讨会。A太狭隘；提到招聘会是背景，但其日期不是重点。B是错误目的；未列出具体公司。D是相关但未要求的行动。

questions.stem: What are students asked to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A printed copy of their resume.
options.B: A list of target companies.
options.C: Their student identification card.
options.D: A notebook and pen.

questions.explanation: A正确，如直接说明：'请携带当前简历的打印版。'B是相关但未提及的物品，可能有用但未要求。C是错误归属细节；学生证在校园活动中常见，但此处未指定。D是错误细节；虽然合理，但通知未提及这些物品。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: This is a reminder for history department honors candidates. Your oral thesis defenses are scheduled for the week of May 5th. Each defense will be held in Professor Clayborne's seminar room, Ferguson Hall 312, and will last approximately one hour. It is mandatory for the defending student to provide a digital copy of their full thesis to the committee at least one week prior. The defenses are open to the university community, and we encourage fellow students to attend. Please confirm your specific date and time with the department secretary by this Friday.

questions.stem: What must honors candidates do at least one week before their defense?

options.A: Schedule a practice session with Professor Clayborne.
options.B: Post a summary of their thesis on the department website.
options.C: Attend another student's defense for practice.
options.D: Provide a digital thesis copy to the committee.

questions.explanation: D正确，如直接说明：'至少在答辩前一周向委员会提交完整论文的电子版。'A是相关但未提及的行动。B是错误细节；未要求发布摘要。C是错误归属细节；鼓励社区成员参加其他答辩，但对候选人非强制。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the thesis defenses?

options.A: They are private meetings only for faculty and the student.
options.B: They are considered a formal part of the honors program.
options.C: They will be recorded and posted online for later viewing.
options.D: They focus primarily on the student's written grammar.

questions.explanation: B是有效推断，得到正式安排、强制性要求和对大学社区开放邀请的支持，表明这是正式课程组成部分。A是反向意图，因为答辩'对大学社区开放'。C是过度推断；未提及录制。D是不相关推断；答辩重点未指定。

items.situation: study abroad information session with returned students
items.announcement: Attention students interested in studying abroad next year. The Office of International Programs is hosting an information session this Thursday at 4 p.m. in the Global Commons, Room 205. We are thrilled to announce that several students who recently returned from programs in Spain, Japan, and South Africa will be sharing their firsthand experiences. Please note that this session is specifically for students who have already completed the preliminary application on our portal. We want to emphasize that attending this session is a mandatory step before your application interview can be scheduled. Don't miss this valuable opportunity to get your questions answered.

questions.stem: What must students do to have their application interview scheduled?

options.A: Attend the Thursday information session
options.B: Submit letters of recommendation
options.C: Contact a returned student directly
options.D: Complete a language proficiency test

questions.explanation: 通知说明参加该环节是安排面试前的强制性步骤，因此A正确。B、C和D与留学相关，但在此通知中未提及作为要求。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the students speaking at the session?

options.A: They are faculty members from the host countries.
options.B: They have already graduated from the university.
options.C: They have personal experience with the programs.
options.D: They will help students complete applications.

questions.explanation: 通知说学生将分享他们的'第一手经验'，这直接支持他们拥有个人经验的推断。A错误，因为他们是学生，不是教职员工。B是过度推断；他们是最近返回，不一定已毕业。D是相关但未说明的行动；他们的角色被描述为分享经验。

items.situation: student art market in the quad
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The Campus Arts Council is excited to announce our annual Spring Student Art Market, taking place this Friday and Saturday from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. in the Main Quad. This event showcases and sells original artwork, jewelry, and ceramics created exclusively by our undergraduate students. All proceeds go directly to the student artists. Please be aware that we are accepting cash and major credit cards, but we cannot process mobile payments. We encourage everyone to come out, support your fellow students, and find unique gifts. Rain location will be the Student Union Ballroom.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To recruit volunteers for an arts festival
options.B: To advertise a student art sale event
options.C: To announce a change in the quad's hours
options.D: To explain new payment systems on campus

questions.explanation: 通知的主要目的是宣传学生艺术市场的日期、地点和详情。A错误，因为它提到招募志愿者，但通知未说明。C太狭隘，专注于次要细节（时间/地点）。D错误，因为它专注于关于支付方式的次要细节。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the artwork at the market?

options.A: It is donated by professional artists.
options.B: It will be available at a discounted price.
options.C: It has been judged in a competition.
options.D: It is made by current students.

questions.explanation: 通知说明艺术品'完全由我们本科生创作'，因此D是直接推断。A错误，因为是学生创作，不是专业人士。B是过度推断；未提及折扣。C是相关但未说明的细节；活动是市场，不一定是评审比赛。

items.situation: renowned scientist giving a guest lecture on campus
items.announcement: Attention all science majors and interested students. We are thrilled to host Dr. Elena Vance, a renowned astrophysicist, for a guest lecture next Tuesday, April 12th, at 7:30 p.m. in Waldman Auditorium. Dr. Vance will be discussing her recent research on exoplanet atmospheres and the search for habitable worlds. This is a rare opportunity to hear from a leader in the field. Please note that while the event is free, you must reserve a ticket in advance through the university's events website due to limited seating. We strongly recommend registering early, as we expect this to be a popular event.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To promote a new astrophysics course
options.B: To announce a change in the auditorium location
options.C: To publicize a free lecture requiring tickets
options.D: To recruit students for a research project

questions.explanation: 通知的核心是告知需要门票预订的免费客座讲座。A和D是未提及的错误目的。B是错误归属细节；给出了地点但未改变。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker recommend registering early?

options.A: Seating capacity is limited.
options.B: Ticket prices may increase.
options.C: Registration confirms major eligibility.
options.D: The website often crashes.

questions.explanation: 通知说明需要门票'因为座位有限'，这直接支持建议提前注册是因为空间有限的推断。B错误，因为活动免费。C是错误细节；活动针对'感兴趣的学生'，不仅限于特定专业。D是无证据的不相关推断。

items.situation: financial aid office workshop on scholarship applications
items.announcement: This is a reminder from the Financial Aid Office. We are holding a workshop this Wednesday at 3 p.m. in Student Services, Room 108, to help students navigate the process for applying for internal university scholarships. Our advisors will walk you through the application forms and provide tips for writing strong personal statements. Please bring your student ID and a laptop or notebook if possible. While walk-ins are welcome, we strongly encourage you to sign up on our office's webpage to guarantee we have enough materials. The deadline for the major scholarship applications is next Friday.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce new scholarship funding
options.B: To remind students of a financial aid deadline
options.C: To describe changes in tuition fees
options.D: To inform students about a helpful workshop

questions.explanation: 通知的主要目的是告知学生提供奖学金申请帮助的研讨会。A和C是未提及的错误目的。B太狭隘；提到了截止日期，但不是通知的主要焦点。

questions.stem: What are students advised to bring to the workshop?

options.A: A completed application form
options.B: A student ID
options.C: Proof of income
options.D: Letters of recommendation

questions.explanation: 通知明确写着'请携带学生证'。A选项错误，因为该工作坊旨在协助填写表格，而非审阅已完成的表格。C和D选项虽与助学金相关，但并未被列为需携带至此工作坊的物品。

items.situation: campus bookstore moving to a new building
items.announcement: Attention. Please be aware that the campus bookstore will be temporarily closed from May 15th through May 22nd as we relocate to the new University Center building. During this week, online orders will still be processed, but in-person purchases and textbook buybacks will be unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience. The grand reopening in our new, larger space will be on Monday, May 23rd, at 9 a.m. To celebrate, we're offering a 20% discount on all spirit wear and school supplies for the first three days. We appreciate your patience during this exciting transition.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A temporary bookstore closure for a move
options.B: The grand opening of a new University Center
options.C: Changes to the textbook buyback policy
options.D: An apology for recent poor service

questions.explanation: 通知的核心是告知因搬迁而临时关闭。B选项过于狭隘，仅关注重新开放部分。C选项属细节错置；通知提到搬迁期间无法回购，但政策并未改变。D选项目的错误；虽有致歉，但并非主要内容。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the new bookstore location?

options.A: It will have shorter operating hours.
options.B: It will sell a wider variety of food.
options.C: It will be larger than the old one.
options.D: It will be farther from most classrooms.

questions.explanation: 通知将新空间描述为'更大'，因此C是合理推断。A选项意图颠倒；未讨论营业时间，但盛大重开暗示全面运营。B选项是关于产品种类的无关推断。D选项属过度推断；未提供邻近性信息。

items.situation: industry professional speaking about career paths
items.announcement: Good morning, computer science majors. The Department is hosting a special talk next Thursday at 5 p.m. in the Tech Hub, Room 101. Our speaker is Maria Chen, a senior product manager at a leading tech firm, who will discuss non-traditional career paths for CS graduates, including roles in product management, UX design, and tech consulting. Please note that this session is designed for juniors and seniors actively considering their post-graduation options. While attendance is not mandatory, we strongly believe it will be invaluable for your career planning. You are required to RSVP by Monday using the link in the department newsletter to secure your spot.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce a mandatory department meeting
options.B: To promote an optional career-focused talk
options.C: To recruit students for a new UX design course
options.D: To introduce a new faculty member

questions.explanation: 通知宣传职业路径讲座，明确说明非强制但很有价值，且需预约。A选项错误，因通知表明出席非强制。C选项相关但未明确说明。D选项目的错误；演讲者是行业专家，而非新教员。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the intended audience for this talk?

options.A: They are all seeking internships.
options.B: They are primarily first-year students.
options.C: They have already secured job offers.
options.D: They are nearing graduation.

questions.explanation: 通知说明该环节'面向积极考虑毕业后选择的大三、大四学生'，这支持了他们临近毕业的推断。A选项属过度推断；他们是在考虑选择，不一定仅限于实习。B选项与所述受众相反。C选项是无证据的无关推断。

items.situation: building wing closure for asbestos removal
items.announcement: Attention all campus recreation users. Please be advised that the east wing of the Anderson Athletic Center, which houses the racquetball courts and two dance studios, will be closed for asbestos abatement starting Monday, October 3rd. This necessary safety project is expected to last approximately two weeks. During this time, all scheduled activities in those spaces are canceled or relocated. We have arranged for racquetball players to use courts at the downtown community center by presenting their student ID. The main gym, weight room, and pool will remain open on their regular schedules. We apologize for the disruption.

questions.stem: What must racquetball players do to use an alternative facility?

options.A: Pay a fee at the downtown center
options.B: Register online with Campus Recreation
options.C: Show their student identification
options.D: Use the facility only on weekends

questions.explanation: 通知说明'出示学生证'即可进入。A选项错误，因未提及费用。B选项相关但未明确说明。D选项属细节错置；未提及仅限于周末的限制。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the closure?

options.A: It is for urgent safety reasons.
options.B: It will reduce membership fees.
options.C: It affects the entire athletic center.
options.D: It was requested by student athletes.

questions.explanation: 关闭是因'石棉清除'，描述为'必要的安全项目'，这支持了出于紧急安全原因的推断。B选项是无证据的无关推断。C选项错误，因主健身房、举重室和泳池保持开放。D选项属过度推断；无证据表明是谁提出的要求。

items.situation: parking lot closure for alumni weekend with shuttle alternative
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. This is a parking notice for Homecoming Weekend. Lot G, located behind the Alumni Hall, will be closed to all university parking from 5 p.m. this Friday until Sunday evening. The lot is being reserved for visiting alumni event parking. Any vehicles left in Lot G after 5 p.m. on Friday will be towed. To accommodate displaced parkers, we will run a complimentary shuttle bus from the remote Lot Z on the south edge of campus. The shuttle will run every fifteen minutes from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. on Saturday and Sunday. Please plan accordingly.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: Announcing new shuttle bus routes
options.B: Describing Homecoming Weekend events
options.C: Warning about increased traffic delays
options.D: Informing about a parking lot closure

questions.explanation: 通知核心是G停车场因返校节关闭、其后果及班车替代方案。A选项过于狭隘，仅关注班车细节。B选项错误；虽提及周末但未描述活动。C选项相关但未明确说明；未提及交通状况。

questions.stem: What will happen to cars left in Lot G after 5 p.m. Friday?

options.A: They will be relocated to Lot Z.
options.B: They will be towed away.
options.C: They will receive a parking ticket.
options.D: They will be allowed to stay until Sunday.

questions.explanation: 通知明确说明车辆'将被拖走'。A选项属细节错置；班车从Z停车场出发，但车辆不会被移至该处。C选项看似合理但错误；明确说明的后果是拖车。D选项与所述内容相反。

items.situation: honors thesis oral defense schedule announcement
items.announcement: Attention all honors students and faculty. The Philosophy Department is pleased to announce the schedule for this semester's honors thesis oral defenses. The presentations will take place next Monday and Tuesday, April 14th and 15th, in the third-floor seminar room of the Humanities Building. Each student will have twenty minutes to present, followed by a ten-minute question period. We strongly encourage all students, especially those considering an honors thesis in the future, to attend these sessions. Please note that the room has limited seating, so we advise arriving a few minutes early to secure a spot.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the schedule for thesis presentations
options.B: To recruit faculty for thesis committees
options.C: To explain the grading criteria for theses
options.D: To remind students of a thesis submission deadline

questions.explanation: A选项正确，因为通知的主要目的是告知口头答辩的时间与地点。B选项目的错误，未提及招聘教员。C选项目的错误，未讨论评分标准。D选项意图颠倒；通知是关于参加答辩，而非提交作品。

questions.stem: What are students advised to do to secure a seat at the presentations?

options.A: Register online in advance
options.B: Bring their own chair
options.C: Arrive a few minutes early
options.D: Contact the department secretary

questions.explanation: C选项正确，因通知中直接说明。A选项属相关但未明确说明的行为；未提及在线注册。B选项属细节错置，将座位有限的概念极端化。D选项细节错误；未建议联系秘书以确保座位。

items.situation: student lounge or study area closing for pipe/ceiling repair
items.announcement: Attention students. Please be aware that the main student lounge in the University Center will be closed for emergency ceiling repairs starting this Wednesday, October 8th. A burst pipe over the weekend has caused water damage, making the space unsafe for use. The closure is expected to last through Friday, October 10th. During this time, we are opening the multipurpose room in the adjacent Student Activities Building as an alternative study space. We apologize for the inconvenience and ask for your patience while we complete these necessary repairs to restore the lounge.

questions.stem: What is the primary purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To describe the cause of water damage in a building
options.B: To inform about a temporary lounge closure and alternative space
options.C: To apologize for ongoing construction noise
options.D: To announce a permanent relocation of the student lounge

questions.explanation: B选项正确，涵盖了主要消息（关闭）和关键细节（替代空间）。A选项过于狭隘，仅关注原因而非目的。C选项目的错误；未提及噪音。D选项意图颠倒；关闭是临时性的，非永久。

questions.stem: Where are students directed to go while the lounge is closed?

options.A: The library's 24-hour study zone
options.B: The cafeteria on the first floor
options.C: Any open classroom in the University Center
options.D: The multipurpose room in the Student Activities Building

questions.explanation: D选项正确，因直接说明。A选项属相关但未明确说明的常见替代方案。B选项细节错误；未提及食堂作为替代。C选项属细节错置；虽提及大学中心，但未提供具体教室作为解决方案。

items.situation: LinkedIn profile photo day at career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The Career Development Center is excited to offer a professional LinkedIn headshot day next Thursday, November 6th, from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. in our main lobby. A professional photographer will be on-site to take high-quality photos suitable for your online profiles and resumes. This service is free for all currently enrolled students. We do require that you sign up for a 10-minute time slot in advance through the events page on our website. Please dress in business casual attire for your session, and don't miss this great opportunity to enhance your professional image.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A new career counseling workshop series
options.B: A job fair requiring professional attire
options.C: A free opportunity to get a professional headshot
options.D: A photography contest with a cash prize

questions.explanation: C选项正确，总结了活动的核心内容。A选项目的错误；未提及系列工作坊。B选项属细节错置；将着装细节应用于不同活动（招聘会）。D选项意图颠倒；这是一项服务，而非比赛。

questions.stem: What must students do to participate in the headshot event?

options.A: Sign up for a time slot online in advance
options.B: Bring their own digital camera
options.C: Pay a small fee at the door
options.D: Submit a resume for review

questions.explanation: A选项正确，因直接说明（'需提前报名'）。B选项细节错误；提供摄影师。C选项意图颠倒；服务明确免费。D选项属相关但未明确说明的职业中心常见活动。

items.situation: cultural food festival organized by international club
items.announcement: Attention. The International Students Association is thrilled to host our annual Global Bites Festival this Saturday on the Main Quad from noon until 6 p.m. This event features food stalls from over fifteen different student cultural organizations, offering small tasting portions for just two dollars each. The festival is open to the entire campus community. Proceeds from food sales will support the ISA's scholarship fund for study abroad programs. We want to emphasize that this is a cash-only event, so please plan accordingly. Come enjoy delicious food while supporting a great cause.

questions.stem: How much does each food tasting portion cost at the festival?

options.A: One dollar
options.B: They are free of charge
options.C: Five dollars
options.D: Two dollars

questions.explanation: D选项正确，因直接说明。A选项细节错误（一美元 vs. 两美元）。B选项意图颠倒（并非免费）。C选项细节错误（五美元 vs. 两美元）。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the International Students Association?

options.A: It organizes weekly cooking classes for members.
options.B: It uses some event funds to support student scholarships.
options.C: It requires membership for festival attendance.
options.D: It is funded primarily by the university administration.

questions.explanation: B选项是合理推断，因通知说明收益支持ISA奖学金基金。A选项属过度推断；未提及或暗示每周课程。C选项意图颠倒；活动面向整个校园开放。D选项属无关推断；未讨论资金来源。

items.situation: grand reopening of renovated gallery or performance hall
items.announcement: This is a reminder that the grand reopening of the fully renovated campus art gallery is this Friday, September 12th. We are thrilled to invite all students, faculty, and staff to the celebration, which begins at 5:00 p.m. with remarks from the university president. The gallery, located on the first floor of the Fine Arts Building, will then be open for self-guided tours until 8:00 p.m. Light refreshments will be served. Please note that backpacks and large bags must be checked at the entrance. We look forward to showcasing the new space and the inaugural exhibition, 'Contemporary Perspectives.'

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the reopening event for the art gallery
options.B: To describe the new art exhibition in detail
options.C: To remind students about a bag policy for all buildings
options.D: To advertise a speech by the university president

questions.explanation: A选项正确，涵盖了活动目的。B选项过于狭隘，仅关注活动的一个细节。C选项过于狭隘，仅关注单一规则。D选项过于狭隘，仅关注部分日程。

questions.stem: What are attendees required to do with large bags?

options.A: Leave them in their vehicles
options.B: Carry them at all times
options.C: Check them at the entrance
options.D: Place them under their seats

questions.explanation: C选项正确，因直接说明。A选项属相关但未明确说明的常见规则。B选项意图颠倒；必须寄存，而非携带。D选项属细节错置，套用了剧院等不同场所的规则。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Attention students. The Campus Programming Board presents our annual Fall Film Night this coming Saturday on the South Lawn. We'll be showing a classic comedy starting at dusk, around 7:30 p.m. We encourage you to bring blankets or lawn chairs for seating, as no permanent chairs will be provided. Complimentary popcorn and hot chocolate will be available while supplies last. In case of rain, the event will be moved to the auditorium in the Student Union. Please be aware that pets, with the exception of service animals, are not permitted at this event. We hope to see you there!

questions.stem: What are students encouraged to bring for seating at the film night?

options.A: Folding tables for snacks
options.B: Blankets or lawn chairs
options.C: Cushions from their dorm rooms
options.D: Reserved seat tickets

questions.explanation: B选项正确，因直接说明。A选项属相关但未明确说明的物品（零食桌）。C选项细节错误；未提及靠垫，提及的是毯子。D选项属细节错置；这是免费开放活动，非售票活动。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the South Lawn as a venue?

options.A: It is primarily used for athletic events.
options.B: It has permanent seating for large audiences.
options.C: It is located far from student housing.
options.D: It is an open space without built-in seating.

questions.explanation: D是有效推断，因为通知声明不提供固定座椅，意味着没有内置座位。A是无关推断；其主要用途未讨论。B是反向意图；缺少固定座椅与此矛盾。C是过度推断；未提及或暗示与住宿的距离。

items.situation: temporary road closure and detour instructions
items.announcement: Good morning. This is an important traffic advisory. A portion of Campus Loop Road, between the library and the engineering complex, will be closed for repaving from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. this Wednesday, March 5th. All vehicular traffic, including campus shuttles, must use the marked detour via Service Drive behind the athletic fields. Pedestrian and bicycle access will remain open on the sidewalks. We apologize for the inconvenience and ask drivers to please plan for extra travel time. The road will reopen fully by Wednesday evening. Thank you for your cooperation.

questions.stem: What must drivers do during the road closure on Wednesday?

options.A: Park their vehicles and use the shuttle
options.B: Avoid the campus entirely that day
options.C: Use the detour via Service Drive
options.D: Obtain a special parking permit

questions.explanation: C正确，因为直接陈述。A是错误细节；班车也必须绕行，且不建议停车。B是过度推断；无需避免。D是相关但未陈述的常见校园后勤事项。

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention that sidewalks will remain open?

options.A: To assure pedestrians and cyclists they can still pass through
options.B: To warn that sidewalks may be crowded with vehicles
options.C: To remind people to walk instead of drive
options.D: To indicate that the repaving includes sidewalk repairs

questions.explanation: A是有效推断；声明人行道开放直接回应了非车辆通行的担忧。B是反向意图；车辆不允许上人行道。C是过度推断；虽然步行是选项，但声明并未积极鼓励。D是错误细节；通知是关于道路重铺，而非人行道维修。

items.situation: end-of-semester academic showcase with awards
items.announcement: Attention all members of the Biology Society. This is a final reminder about our End-of-Semester Research Showcase this Friday at 4 p.m. in the Life Sciences Auditorium. Undergraduate researchers from all biology sub-disciplines will present their semester projects. Following the presentations, we will announce the winners of the annual Excellence in Undergraduate Research awards. Attendance is mandatory for society members, as noted in our constitution. We also welcome any students interested in biology to attend. Please arrive by 3:45 p.m. to check in and find seating.

questions.stem: For whom is attendance at the showcase mandatory?

options.A: All undergraduate biology majors
options.B: Faculty judges of the awards
options.C: Students presenting their research
options.D: Members of the Biology Society

questions.explanation: D正确，因为直接陈述（'对社团成员强制要求'）。A是错误细节；这是针对社团成员，而非所有专业。B是相关但未陈述的合理群体。C是错误细节；演讲者可能需要参加，但强制规则明确针对社团成员。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the Biology Society?

options.A: It organizes social events every weekend.
options.B: It recognizes outstanding student research with awards.
options.C: Its membership is limited to graduate students.
options.D: It requires members to present research each semester.

questions.explanation: B是有效推断，因为社团正在举办宣布研究奖项的活动。A是过度推断；未提及每周社交活动。C是反向意图；活动以本科生研究者为特色，暗示本科生成员资格。D是过度推断；虽然部分成员可能演讲，但未声明对所有成员是要求。
